subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! One of the letters which thou didst send hath been received through Áqá Mírzá Mahdí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان یکی از نامها که ارسال نموده بودید بواسطه آقا میرزا مهدی علیه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
